title: Can't reference a class' field in a non-top module: Node has no type

features.name: class field access in non-top module
features.description: Code should include a class with an int field, instantiated in a non-top module, with field access via dot notation

features.name: nested module instantiation with class usage
features.description: Code should include a top module that instantiates a child module which uses a class type and accesses class fields
